text: Hezbullah released phenomenal footage of a suicide drone launch towards an Israeli army gathering point in the town of Taybeh The Israeli forces were located using ground intelligence and then information was related to the targeting team ⭕ بالفيديو | مشاهد من عملية استهداف المقاومة الإسلامية تموضع لجنود جيش العدو الإسرائيلي في بلدة الطيبة جنوبي لبنان بمسيّرة انقضاضيّة. جودة عالية #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: 真主党发布了令人惊叹的视频，显示一架自杀式无人机向黎巴嫩泰贝镇（Taybeh）的一个以色列军队集结点发起攻击。以色列军队的位置是通过地面情报确定的，随后信息被传达给目标锁定小组 ⭕ 视频 | 伊斯兰抵抗运动使用自杀式无人机袭击黎巴嫩南部泰贝镇敌方以色列军队阵地的画面。高清 #战争媒体

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - UK says it will not be involved in U.S. blockade of the Hormuz Strait, and is currently "urgently working with France and other partners to put together a wide coalition to protect the freedom of navigation." — Sky tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 Donald Trump: 📌 “It will be all or nothing — that’s the reality. You’ve seen what we did with Venezuela. This will be similar, but on a much higher level. It’s called ‘everyone in and everyone out.’” 📌 “There will come a time when everyone will be allowed to enter and exit, but it won’t be based on percentages. It won’t be limited to allies or friendly nations — the principle will be ‘all or nothing.’” 📌 “We are bringing in ships — a lot of ships. We believe many other countries will help, but we are imposing a full blockade. We will not allow Iran to profit from selective oil sales.” 📌 “We are going to block the Strait of Hormuz. It will take some time, but it will become effective very quickly.” 📌 “They came in as if they had cards, but they don’t have any.” 📌 “We have new technologies to destroy drones — so-called computerized munitions, as well as lasers that can melt drones. It’s quite something to see.” 📌 “Iran has not left the negotiating table, and I predict they will return and give us everything we want.” 📌 “I could destroy Iran in one day — even in an hour. I could take control of their entire energy sector, every facility, every power plant.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 唐纳德·特朗普：📌 “要么全有，要么全无——这就是现实。你们已经看到了我们对委内瑞拉所做的一切。这次也会类似，但级别要高得多。这叫‘全员进入，全员退出’。” 📌 “总有一天，每个人都会被允许进出，但这不会基于百分比。它不会局限于盟友或友好国家——原则将是‘要么全有，要么全无’。” 📌 “我们正在调集船只——大量的船只。我们相信许多其他国家会提供帮助，但我们正在实施全面封锁。我们不会允许伊朗从选择性石油销售中获利。” 📌 “我们将封锁霍尔木兹海峡。这需要一些时间，但很快就会生效。” 📌 “他们进来时好像手里有牌，但他们什么都没有。” 📌 “我们有摧毁无人机的新技术——所谓的计算机化弹药，以及可以熔化无人机的激光。这景象相当壮观。” 📌 “伊朗并没有离开谈判桌，我预测他们会回来并给我们想要的一切。” 📌 “我可以在一天之内摧毁伊朗——甚至一小时内。我可以控制他们的整个能源部门、每一个设施、每一座发电厂。” 与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : "Tisza is on the verge of a parliamentary supermajority." 💥 Polls closed in Hungary. No exit poll, but 21 Research Institute’s Apr 8–11 exclusive survey for @Telexhu shows Tisza leading Fidesz 55–38, with Our Homeland around the 5% threshold. Tisza is on the verge of a parliamentary supermajority. https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 - Szabolcs Panyi tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : “Tisza党正处于议会绝对多数的边缘。” 💥 匈牙利投票结束。没有出口民调，但21研究所为 @Telexhu 做的4月8日至11日的独家调查显示，Tisza党以55%对38%领先青民盟（Fidesz），“我们的祖国”党在5%的门槛左右。Tisza党正处于议会绝对多数的边缘。 https://twitter.com/panyiszabolcs/status/2043375377922338999/photo/1 - Szabolcs Panyi推文

text: WarTranslated Iran’s IRGC warns any US military ship approaching the Strait of Hormuz will be treated as a ceasefire violation and face harsh and decisive measures. Trump hadn't finished unblocking the Strait of Hormuz before announcing his own blockade of it. Interesting plan. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043318346498691274/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队警告称，任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的美国军舰都将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临严厉而果断的措施。特朗普还没封锁完霍尔木兹海峡，就宣布要对其进行封锁。有趣的计划。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043318346498691274/photo/1 - WarTranslated推文

text: 🇮🇷 What was denied in the past 24 hours — Quotes attributed to Araghchi about the negotiations and his response to Vance's behavior during the talks. — Entry of American vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. — Presence of four countries China, Russia, Saudi Arabia, and Qatar in the negotiations. — Landing of a plane in Islamabad and the joining of an Iranian official to the negotiations during the talks. — Sending weapons and military and defense equipment from China to Iran. — Airborne enemy forces in the Qalaei area of Selseleh County, Lorestan.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 过去24小时内被否认的内容 — 关于阿拉格齐（Araghchi）在谈判中的言论以及他对万斯（Vance）在会谈中行为的回应的引述。 — 美国船只进入霍尔木兹海峡。 — 中国、俄罗斯、沙特阿拉伯和卡塔尔四个国家参加谈判。 — 飞机在伊斯兰堡降落，以及伊朗官员在会谈期间加入谈判。 — 中国向伊朗运送武器及军事和防御装备。 — 敌方空降部队出现在洛雷斯坦省塞尔塞莱县（Selseleh County）的Qalaei地区。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : A senior Israeli security official said Israel wants to renew the war against Iran, arguing that Operation Roaring Lion was halted too early without sufficient pressure on Tehran over its nuclear and ballistic missile programmes. Israel is awaiting U.S. President Trump’s decision, while the IDF is preparing alongside U.S. forces for a renewed campaign, including an American troop buildup in the region with ground troops. If a green light is given, Israel intends to strike Iranian national infrastructure and energy facilities to exert economic pressure until Tehran agrees to give up its nuclear programme. U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper is expected to visit Israel tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：一位以色列高级安全官员表示，以色列希望重启对伊朗的战争，理由是“咆哮狮子行动”（Operation Roaring Lion）停止得太早，没有对德黑兰的核计划和弹道导弹计划施加足够的压力。以色列正在等待美国总统特朗普的决定，同时以色列国防军正与美军一道为重启行动做准备，包括美国在地区增加地面部队。如果获得绿灯，以色列打算打击伊朗的国家基础设施和能源设施，以施加经济压力，直到德黑兰同意放弃其核计划。美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）海军上将预计将于明天访问以色列。 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: A staggering 68% of Americans say they are ‘worried’ about the current state of the war with Iran, with 57% saying they feel ‘stressed’ @Middle_East_Spectatir

text: — This is how little the Americans care about their ‘allies’ in the Persian Gulf btw. They don’t care if you get hit, even in the slightest. Signing the Abraham Accords, staying silent on Palestinian genocide, enforcing rampant secularization — none of it matters, all you are is a cash cow to America. They don’t even consider you within their calculations. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 顺便说一句，美国人对他们在波斯湾的‘盟友’有多么不在乎。他们根本不在乎你是否受到打击，哪怕是一点点。签署《亚伯拉罕协议》，对巴勒斯坦种族灭绝保持沉默，强制推行猖獗的世俗化——这些都不重要，你对美国来说只是一个摇钱树。他们甚至没有把你纳入他们的考量范围。 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 Polls have opened in Hungary’s national elections, with Prime Minister Viktor Orbán facing challenger Péter Magyar after 16 years of Orbán’s rule. Orbán leads the ruling Fidesz party, and has built his platform around nationalist policies and a confrontational…" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Polls have closed in Hungary’s parliamentary election, with turnout at 77.8% as of 18:30 local time, significantly higher than the 67.8% recorded in the 2022 vote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利全国大选投票开始，总理维克托·欧尔班在执政16年后迎战挑战者彼得·马贾尔（Péter Magyar）。欧尔班领导执政的青民盟，并围绕民族主义政策和对抗性平台建立了他的纲领……” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利议会选举投票结束，截至当地时间18:30，投票率为77.8%，显著高于2022年投票时记录的67.8%。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Approaching the Strait of Hormuz with military vessels will be considered a violation of the ceasefire. - IRGC In its 59th official statement, the Public Relations office of Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy rejected claims made by hostile officials and affirmed that the Strait of Hormuz remains open and under secure, controlled management. Civilian vessels continue to pass safely under established regulations. The IRGC Navy also stated that any military vessel attempting to approach the Strait, under any pretext, will be treated as a breach of the ceasefire and will face a firm and decisive response. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的军舰都将被视为违反停火协议。 - 伊斯兰革命卫队 在其第59份官方声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军公共关系办公室驳斥了敌对官员的说法，并确认霍尔木兹海峡保持开放，处于安全、受控的管理之下。民用船只继续在既定规定下安全通行。伊斯兰革命卫队海军还表示，任何试图以任何借口接近海峡的军舰都将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临坚定而果断的回应。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu visited southern Lebanon with the Israeli defense minister Israel Katz and IDF chief of staff Eyal Zamir, stating that “the war continues, including inside the security zone in Lebanon.” He said Israel has thwarted the threat of invasion from Lebanon and is pushing back anti‑tank fire and rockets, but more work remains. “Our enemies – Iran and the axis of evil – came to destroy us, and now they are simply fighting for their survival. We have changed the face of the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡、国防部长卡茨和以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔在黎巴嫩境内进行了安全局势评估。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列总理内塔尼亚胡与以色列国防部长伊斯雷尔·卡茨和以色列国防军参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔访问了黎巴嫩南部，并表示“战争仍在继续，包括在黎巴嫩境内的安全区。” 他说，以色列已经挫败了来自黎巴嫩的入侵威胁，并正在击退反坦克火力和火箭弹，但仍有工作要做。“我们的敌人——伊朗和邪恶轴心——来到这里是为了摧毁我们，而现在他们只是在为生存而战。我们已经改变了中东的面貌。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Talks in Cairo between mediators, US officials and Hamas on a disarmament plan are expected to continue this week, per Ynet. A U.S. official said a decision is expected within days: “We will know whether there is voluntary disarmament or by force.” The proposal envisions full disarmament over six to eight months, starting with heavy weapons and rocket production facilities, followed by tunnel destruction and surrender of small arms. Oversight would be provided by a combined Palestinian security and international stabilisation force, but the latter has been delayed due to the war with Iran. Approximately $7 billion in reconstruction pledges has been secured, but funds will not be released until disarmament begins – a condition Hamas rejects, citing it as one of the reasons it refuses to disarm. Some Hamas leaders view disarmament as surrender. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Saturday: “We will deal with it,” referring to Hamas. Israeli Army Radio noted that Netanyahu is preparing the ground for the next front – Hamas in Gaza – admitting that Hamas is far from being dismantled. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸🇪🇬🇺🇸🇮🇱 一个哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人及美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫（Nikolay Mladenov）举行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括哈马斯解除武装和进入……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 据Ynet报道，调解人、美国官员和哈马斯之间关于解除武装计划的开罗会谈预计将于本周继续。一位美国官员表示，预计几天内会有决定：“我们将知道是自愿解除武装还是被迫解除武装。” 该提案设想在六到八个月内全面解除武装，首先是重型武器和火箭生产设施，随后是摧毁隧道和上缴轻武器。监督工作将由巴勒斯坦联合安全部队和国际稳定部队提供，但后者因与伊朗的战争而推迟。约70亿美元的重建承诺已经落实，但在解除武装开始前资金不会发放——这是哈马斯拒绝的一个条件，并称这是其拒绝解除武装的原因之一。一些哈马斯领导人将解除武装视为投降。以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡周六表示：“我们会处理的”，指的是哈马斯。以色列陆军电台指出，内塔尼亚胡正在为下一个战线——加沙的哈马斯——做准备，承认哈马斯远未被瓦解。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu visits Lebanese territory under Israeli occupation.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡访问了以色列占领下的黎巴嫩领土。

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 Egypt’s Foreign Minister Badr Abdelatty held a phone call with U.S. Special Envoy Steve Witkoff to discuss regional developments following U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad. Witkoff briefed Egypt on the U.S. position during negotiations, while Abdelatty emphasized the importance of peaceful solutions to maintain regional stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 埃及外交部长巴德尔·阿卜杜勒阿提（Badr Abdelatty）与美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）通电话，讨论美伊伊斯兰堡会谈后的地区局势发展。威特科夫向埃及通报了美国在谈判中的立场，而阿卜杜勒阿提强调了和平解决方案对维护地区稳定的重要性。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 DroneBomber added that in the Moscow region, at least 11 drones crossed the Moscow Ring Road, passing approximately 113 air defense positions. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368866558943598/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 DroneBomber补充说，在莫斯科地区，至少有11架无人机越过了莫斯科环城公路，经过了大约113个防空阵地。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368866558943598/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ According to Hungary’s election administration, voter turnout reached a high 74.23% by 17:00. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368310524252472/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 根据匈牙利选举管理部门的数据，截至17:00，选民投票率达到了74.23%的高位。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043368310524252472/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Navy: Strait of Hormuz remains open for civilian vessels under "smart control". Military vessels approaching the strait will be considered ceasefire violation and met with "severe response" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊斯兰革命卫队海军：霍尔木兹海峡在“智能控制”下对民用船只保持开放。接近海峡的军舰将被视为违反停火协议，并将面临“严厉回应” 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says it is continuing operations tied to October 7, hunting and eliminating several terrorists involved in hostage taking. Among those eliminated was a fighter linked to the kidnapping of Yair Goldberg-Polin, Alon Ahel, Elia Cohen, and Or Levi from the Migronit site in Re’im. Additional operatives who held Avinatan Or in captivity were also targeted and killed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军表示，它正在继续进行与10月7日相关的行动，搜捕并消灭了几名参与劫持人质的恐怖分子。在被消灭的人员中，有一名与从雷姆（Re’im）的Migronit地点绑架Yair Goldberg-Polin、Alon Ahel、Elia Cohen和Or Levi有关的武装分子。其他扣押Avinatan Or的武装人员也成为目标并被击毙。推文

text: 🇺🇸 A U.S. Air Force KC-135 tanker in the UK before returning to the United States. Dozens of patched impact holes are visible across the aircraft, reportedly from an Iranian strike on an airbase in Saudi Arabia. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 一架美国空军KC-135加油机在返回美国前停留在英国。飞机上可见数十个修补过的弹孔，据报道是伊朗对沙特阿拉伯一个空军基地进行打击造成的。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ❗️ Trump admits he has no other cards left but bombing civilian infrastructure: “The only thing left really is their water, which would be very devastating to hit.” I would hate to do it, but it’s their water, their desalination plants, and their electric generating plants. “We could have them all down. And I mean down, like you couldn’t have electricity for ten years…” You’d probably never be able to build them again. “I think we pretty much maxed out, other than those few items.“
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❗️ 特朗普承认他除了轰炸民用基础设施外已无牌可打：“唯一剩下的就是他们的水，打击这些将是非常毁灭性的。” 我不想这样做，但那是他们的水、他们的海水淡化厂和他们的发电厂。“我们可以把它们全部摧毁。我是说摧毁，就像你十年都用不上电一样……” 你可能永远无法重建它们。“我认为除了那几项，我们基本上已经达到极限了。”

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 The 32nd meeting of the Kurdistan National Congress Diplomatic Committee was held in Brussels, with representatives from 23 Kurdish parties and institutions. A moment of silence was observed for those who died in the struggle for freedom. KNK Executive Council representative Zubeir Aydar said the process initiated by Abdullah Öcalan has reached an important stage and needs a legal basis. “Iran is significantly weakened; we must prepare well,” he added. Co‑chair Ahmed Karamus called for a unified national structure for all Kurds, stating that Ankara’s policy remains based on hostility. “Strengthening the alliance between Kurds in eastern Kurdistan is very important,” he said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇧🇪 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇸🇾 库尔德斯坦全国大会外交委员会第32次会议在布鲁塞尔举行，来自23个库尔德政党和机构的代表出席了会议。与会者为在争取自由斗争中牺牲的人默哀。库尔德斯坦全国大会执行委员会代表Zubeir Aydar表示，阿卜杜拉·奥贾兰（Abdullah Öcalan）发起的进程已达到重要阶段，需要法律基础。“伊朗已显著削弱；我们必须做好准备，”他补充道。联合主席Ahmed Karamus呼吁为所有库尔德人建立统一的民族结构，并表示安卡拉的政策仍然基于敌意。“加强东库尔德斯坦库尔德人之间的联盟非常重要，”他说。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy (Announcement No. 59): Contrary to enemy claims, the Strait of Hormuz remains under full control and open to civilian vessels under regulations. Any military vessel approaching under any pretext will be deemed a ceasefire violation and dealt with harshly and decisively.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军（第59号公告）：与敌人的说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡保持在完全控制之下，并在规定下对民用船只开放。任何以任何借口接近的军舰都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The IRGC warned that they will consider any U.S. military vessel approaching the Strait of Hormuz a ceasefire violation. “The Navy of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps declares that contrary to the false claims of some enemy officials, the Strait of Hormuz is under intelligent control and management, open for the safe passage of non-military vessels under specific regulations, and any military vessels attempting to approach the Strait of Hormuz under any pretext or excuse will be considered a violation of the ceasefire and will be dealt with harshly and decisively.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队警告称，他们将把任何接近霍尔木兹海峡的美国军舰视为违反停火协议。“伊斯兰革命卫队海军声明，与某些敌方官员的虚假说法相反，霍尔木兹海峡处于智能控制和管理之下，在特定规定下对非军用船只的安全通行开放，任何试图以任何借口接近霍尔木兹海峡的军舰都将被视为违反停火协议，并将受到严厉和果断的处理。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Seyed Mohammad Marandi in Islamabad, where Iran–US negotiations collapsed, explains the reasons for the failure and warns a return to war is likely. He also notes US media is already airing threats against Iran’s leadership and delegation. Marandi is a Tehran University professor and former advisor to Iran’s nuclear negotiation team. (Recorded 12 April 2026)
text_zh: 🇮🇷 赛义德·穆罕默德·马兰迪（Seyed Mohammad Marandi）在伊朗与美国谈判破裂的伊斯兰堡解释了失败的原因，并警告称战争很可能重演。他还指出，美国媒体已经在播放针对伊朗领导层和代表团的威胁。马兰迪是德黑兰大学教授，也是伊朗核谈判团队的前顾问。（录制于2026年4月12日）

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: A U.S. official lists the gaps between the U.S. and Iran after negotiations in Islamabad: Freezing uranium enrichment in Iran Removing the enriched uranium from the country Dismantling the main uranium enrichment facilities (which are anyway Russian) The scope of unfreezing Iranian funds The date when the Strait of Hormuz will fully reopen and the cancellation of passage fees A regional security agreement and cessation of funding for terrorist organizations They continued on to list the U.S.’s red lines in negotiations: Ending all uranium enrichment Dismantle all major nuclear enrichment facilities (which are mostly destroyed) Retrieve highly enriched uranium Accept a broader peace, security and de-escalation framework that includes regional allies End funding for terrorist proxies Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis Fully open the Strait of Hormuz, charging no tolls for passage One gap in the talks was the amount of Iranian frozen funds that will be released, per source with knowledge @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：一位美国官员列出了伊斯兰堡谈判后美伊之间的分歧：冻结伊朗的铀浓缩；将浓缩铀运出该国；拆除主要的铀浓缩设施（无论如何这些设施都是俄罗斯的）；解冻伊朗资金的范围；霍尔木兹海峡完全重新开放的日期以及取消通行费；地区安全协议和停止资助恐怖组织。他们继续列出了美国在谈判中的红线：结束所有铀浓缩；拆除所有主要的核浓缩设施（大部分已被摧毁）；收回高浓缩铀；接受一个更广泛的和平、安全和去升级框架，包括地区盟友；停止资助恐怖主义代理人哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装；完全开放霍尔木兹海峡，通行不收取任何费用。据知情人士透露，会谈中的一个分歧是将被释放的伊朗冻结资金的数额 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli forces have targeted a alleged Hamas cell that posed a alleged threat to troops in the central Gaza Strip. The strike killed a alleged Hamas member who allegedly took part in the capture of Hersh Goldberg‑Polin, Alon Ohel, Eliya Cohen and Or Levi from the Re’im shelter. Additional fighters who held Avinatan Or were also eliminated. The IDF has released a photo of Muhammad Fuad Ghaser Sayid, a Hamas platoon commander, documented holding Avinatan Or inside a alleged Hamas tunnel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军队针对加沙地带中部一个据称对部队构成威胁的哈马斯小组进行了打击。袭击击毙了一名据称参与从雷姆（Re’im）避难所抓捕Hersh Goldberg‑Polin、Alon Ohel、Eliya Cohen和Or Levi的哈马斯成员。其他扣押Avinatan Or的武装人员也被消灭。以色列国防军发布了一张哈马斯排长Muhammad Fuad Ghaser Sayid的照片，记录了他将Avinatan Or扣押在据称是哈马斯隧道内的情况。 @wfwitness

text: Key sticking points in US–Iran talks: Stopping uranium enrichment Removing enriched uranium from Iran Dismantling key nuclear facilities Deciding how much Iranian money will be unfrozen Reopening the Strait of Hormuz (ending fees) A regional security deal, including ending support for groups Source: Axios
text_zh: 美伊会谈的关键症结：停止铀浓缩；将浓缩铀运出伊朗；拆除关键核设施；决定解冻多少伊朗资金；重新开放霍尔木兹海峡（结束收费）；地区安全协议，包括停止支持相关组织。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A major oil trading loss has emerged amid the Iran war, with one of the world’s top traders suffering hundreds of millions of dollars in setbacks after betting incorrectly on market movements. A team led by a senior trader at Vitoil made large derivatives bets that assumed tensions would ease and prices would move in a certain direction. Instead, the war escalated and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz caused markets to swing sharply the opposite way. The losses ran into several hundred million dollars, though part of the losses has since been recovered and the firm remains profitable overall. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：在伊朗战争中出现了重大的石油交易损失，全球顶级交易商之一在错误押注市场走势后遭受了数亿美元的挫折。由Vitoil公司一位高级交易员领导的团队进行了大规模的衍生品押注，假设紧张局势会缓解，价格会向特定方向移动。然而，战争升级，霍尔木兹海峡的关闭导致市场向相反方向剧烈波动。损失达到数亿美元，尽管部分损失此后已收回，但该公司总体上仍保持盈利。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺: 🚨 I'm in Hungary for the election, its last chance saloon for common sense 🚨 So we take a look at the increasing lack of it across the World. Big Viktor is basically preventing WW3 here in Europe, but that doesn't stop Lindsey and Co trying to start it. Enjoy.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, 俄罗斯的爱尔兰人 🇷🇺：🚨 我在匈牙利参加选举，这是常识的最后机会 🚨 所以我们来看看世界各地常识的日益匮乏。伟大的维克托（Viktor）基本上是在欧洲阻止第三次世界大战，但这并不能阻止林赛（Lindsey）等人试图发动战争。享受吧。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: A new report indicates that while the U.S. has severely degraded Iran’s conventional navy, Tehran still retains effective control over the Strait of Hormuz through a separate force. U.S. strikes destroyed a large portion of Iran’s regular navy, including major warships and vessels. However, the naval arm of the IRGC remains largely intact and continues to dominate the strategic waterway using small, fast-attack boats, drones, and sea mines. This force specialises in asymmetric warfare, allowing Iran to harass and restrict commercial shipping despite heavy military losses. Many of these smaller vessels are harder to target and are reportedly hidden along the coastline. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：一份新报告指出，尽管美国严重削弱了伊朗的常规海军，但德黑兰仍通过一支独立的部队保持着对霍尔木兹海峡的有效控制。美国的打击摧毁了伊朗正规海军的大部分，包括主要军舰和船只。然而，伊斯兰革命卫队的各种海军力量基本完好无损，并继续使用小型快速攻击艇、无人机和水雷控制着这条战略水道。这支部队擅长非对称战争，使伊朗尽管遭受了沉重的军事损失，仍能骚扰和限制商业航运。这些小型船只中的许多更难成为目标，据报道隐藏在海岸线沿线。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及纳哈里亚（Nahariya）周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has summoned the Iraqi ambassador in Riyadh Safia Taleb Al Souhail over continued drone attacks originating from Iraqi territory targeting the kingdom and other Gulf states. A formal diplomatic protest note was handed over. The kingdom stressed that Iraq must act responsibly, and that Saudi Arabia will take all necessary measures to defend its security. The move marks the first Saudi acknowledgement that it has been attacked by pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias, not only by Iran itself. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯就源自伊拉克领土、针对沙特王国及其他海湾国家的持续无人机袭击，召见了伊拉克驻利雅得大使Safia Taleb Al Souhail。一份正式的外交抗议照会已被递交。沙特王国强调，伊拉克必须采取负责任的行动，沙特阿拉伯将采取一切必要措施捍卫其安全。此举标志着沙特首次承认其不仅受到伊朗本身的攻击，还受到亲伊朗伊拉克民兵的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *** Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 12th 1230pm eastern 6:30pm CET! *** He's touched down in China after a 19 hour flight to get you the latest developments from the collapsed peace talks to the next phase of the war, plus breaking down the report of China supplying weapons to Iran and much more! Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=300AFO3TUek
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*** 加入Danny Haiphong今天4月12日东部时间下午12:30，欧洲中部时间下午6:30的直播！*** 他在经历了19小时的飞行后抵达中国，为您带来从破裂的和平谈判到战争下一阶段的最新进展，并深入分析关于中国向伊朗提供武器的报道等等！在此观看：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=300AFO3TUek

text: Chairman of Knesset National Security Committee Tzvika Foghel mocks Trump: Donald, if you have to shoot, shoot. Don’t quack 🦆
text_zh: 以色列议会国家安全委员会主席Tzvika Foghel嘲笑特朗普：唐纳德，如果你要开枪，就开枪。别只会嘎嘎叫 🦆
